name: Ch26Outro
_source: s;Krista;Hm? Oh, you're that merchant we met a while back.
s;Anna;We've been watching you guys travel all over Yondo doing Oreg know what.|{c:e;Anna;Smile}And while you're probably doing something really important,|we've got a huge favor to ask.
s;Anna;Bandit activity's been on the rise,|and our convoy's been having trouble getting to our usual stops.
s;Jake;If we can drive the bandits out of our main route, that'll be a huge help!
s;Anna;And if all goes well, we can supply you with our exclusive stock as a little "thank you"!|What d'ya say?
s;Krista;Sure, we can help you out!
s;Jake;You will? Oh, you have no idea how much this means to us!
s;Krista;Sorry, but we got places to be.
s;Jake;Yeah, it was a long shot.
s;Anna;But hey, don't worry about us. We'll try to figure something out.|Good luck out there!
